name: Help Wanted

title: "[HELP WANTED] "
labels: help wanted, good first issue
assignees: ''

## What needs to be done?
A clear description of the task or improvement needed.

## Why is this important?
Explain the impact and importance of completing this task.

## How to approach it
Step-by-step guidance or pointers for contributors:
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Resources
- Documentation: [link]
- Related code: [path or link]
- Related issues: [#123]

## Success Criteria
How will we know this is complete? What should be tested?

## Difficulty Level
- [ ] Beginner
- [ ] Intermediate
- [ ] Advanced

## Questions?
Feel free to comment with questions before starting!
